creator: kaltheat@gmail.com
text:
After installing [1]gnome-library updates [2]www/xombrero isn't running properly anymore. Xombrero window pops up, but it can't load any URL. It remains in a loading loop.
Starting xombrero produces following output in terminal:

(xombrero-bin:69847): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: g_object_ref: assertion `G_IS_OBJECT (object)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: g_object_ref: assertion `G_IS_OBJECT (object)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: g_object_ref: assertion `G_IS_OBJECT (object)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: g_object_ref: assertion `G_IS_OBJECT (object)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GLib-GObject-CRITICAL **: g_object_ref: assertion `G_IS_OBJECT (object)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): Gdk-CRITICAL **: IA__gdk_window_set_icon_list: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_width: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed


(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_height: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_width: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_height: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_width: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_height: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_width: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_height: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_width: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): GdkPixbuf-CRITICAL **: gdk_pixbuf_get_height: assertion `GDK_IS_PIXBUF (pixbuf)' failed

(xombrero-bin:69847): libsoup-CRITICAL **: soup_session_send_request_async: assertion `use_thread_context' failed


I think some of them were there from beginning not blocking xombrero from doing what it should do. But I think that at least last message is new.

truss shows following error before the libsoup problem:

gettimeofday({1362823318.192577 },0x0)           = 0 (0x0)
access("/home/kaltheat/.local/share/webkit/databases/ApplicationCache.db",0) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
getpid()                                         = 71681 (0x11801)

(xombrero-bin:71681): libsoup-CRITICAL **: soup_session_send_request_async: assertion `use_thread_context' failed
write(2,"\n(xombrero-bin:71681): libsoup-"...,115) = 115 (0x73)
clock_gettime(4,{1986.735808405 })               = 0 (0x0)

and later:

socket(PF_LOCAL,SOCK_STREAM,0)                   = 3 (0x3)
fcntl(3,F_SETFD,FD_CLOEXEC)                      = 0 (0x0)
connect(3,{ AF_UNIX "/tmp/.X11-unix/X0" },106)   = 0 (0x0)
getpeername(3,{ AF_UNIX "/tmp/.X11-unix/X0" },0x7fffffffc874) = 0 (0x0)
..

getpid()                                         = 71681 (0x11801)
clock_gettime(13,{1362823317.000000000 })        = 0 (0x0)
fcntl(3,F_GETFL,)                                = 2 (0x2)

poll({3/POLLIN|POLLOUT},1,-1)                    = 1 (0x1)

poll({3/POLLIN},1,-1)                            = 1 (0x1)
read(3,"\^A\0\^B\0\0\0\0\0\M^?\M^??\0\0"...,4096) = 32 (0x20)
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
poll({3/POLLIN|POLLOUT},1,-1)                    = 1 (0x1)
writev(0x3,0x7fffffffcac0,0x3,0x0,0x0,0x0)       = 44 (0x2c)
poll({3/POLLIN},1,-1)                            = 1 (0x1)
read(3,"\^A\b\^D\0!\0\0\0\^_\0\0\0\0\0\0"...,4096) = 164 (0xa4)
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
poll({3/POLLIN|POLLOUT},1,-1)                    = 1 (0x1)
writev(0x3,0x7fffffffca30,0x3,0x0,0x0,0x0)       = 20 (0x14)
poll({3/POLLIN},1,-1)                            = 1 (0x1)
read(3,"\^A\0\^E\0\0\0\0\0\^A\M^Qa\M^]\0"...,4096) = 32 (0x20)
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
poll({3/POLLIN|POLLOUT},1,-1)                    = 1 (0x1)
writev(0x3,0x7fffffffca60,0x3,0x0,0x0,0x0)       = 8 (0x8)
poll({3/POLLIN},1,-1)                            = 1 (0x1)
read(3,"\^A\^A\^F\0\0\0\0\0\^A\0\0\0\0\0"...,4096) = 32 (0x20)
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
poll({3/POLLIN|POLLOUT},1,-1)                    = 1 (0x1)
writev(0x3,0x7fffffffca90,0x3,0x0,0x0,0x0)       = 916 (0x394)
poll({3/POLLIN},1,-1)                            = 1 (0x1)
read(3,"\^A\0\a\0\0\0\0\0*\^A\0\0\0\0\0"...,4096) = 1088 (0x440)
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
read(3,0x80f5cc02c,4096)                         ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
..

This error repeats to the end.

I think that this problem has to do with gnome library update, but I'm not perfectly sure. On the other hand there is nothing else that I did change than updating ports yesterday ... 

[1] http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=313633
[2] http://www.freshports.org/www/xombrero

How-To-Repeat: start xombrero
